name: The Revenant: Astrid Heathcliff
description:
“Every hero must die,”

Elysium is a land blessed with one of the greatest resources of all… people.

But not just any people — individuals born with extraordinary gifts, the kind that turn men and women into heroes.

The nation poured time and effort into cultivating these so-called ‘heroes’, and for a time, it worked.

But people are fickle things — unreliable, unpredictable. And when you start calling anyone with talent a hero… the cracks start to show.

Now, Elysium is overflowing with filth — frauds and tyrants parading as heroes, wielding their status like a weapon.

Innocents suffer, true heroes are cast aside, and the corrupt flourish.

But in their arrogance, the scum made a fatal mistake: they created a monster — one whose only goal is to see every last hero dead.

They can run. They can hide. But eventually, “The Revenant” will find them… and she will kill them all.

Best stay out of her way. But in the end… that choice is yours.

■■■■■'s Mission:

"Sister, I swear I'll keep you safe."

creator: Dracob
